epics.title: User Authentication
epics.summary: Implement secure user authentication with multi-factor authentication.
epics.description: Develop a secure user authentication system that includes multi-factor authentication (MFA) using OTPs or authenticators. Ensure the system is compliant with industry security standards and capable of handling high traffic volumes.

epics.title: User Profile Management
epics.summary: Manage user profiles including personal details and preferences.
epics.description: Create a user profile management system that allows customers to view and update their personal details and preferences. Ensure the system is secure and provides real-time synchronization with the core banking system.

epics.title: Personalized Dashboard
epics.summary: Develop a personalized dashboard for users based on their profile and eligibility.
epics.description: Design and implement a personalized dashboard that displays available banking products and services based on user profiles and eligibility. The dashboard should provide an intuitive and user-friendly interface, with a focus on responsive design.

epics.title: Core Banking System Integration
epics.summary: Integrate the self-service portal with the core banking system.
epics.description: Develop integration with the core banking system to ensure real-time data synchronization and seamless operation. Implement APIs to allow reading and updating of user data securely and efficiently.

epics.title: Account Opening Workflow
epics.summary: Streamline the account opening process through an efficient workflow.
epics.description: Create a workflow for the online account opening process, minimizing required clicks and steps. The workflow should allow users to save incomplete applications and upload necessary documentation through the interface.

epics.title: Service Modification Workflow
epics.summary: Enable users to submit requests for service modifications.
epics.description: Develop a workflow allowing users to request modifications to their banking services. The system should guide users through the process with clear instructions and require minimal steps to complete.

epics.title: Email Notifications
epics.summary: Implement email notifications for real-time updates.
epics.description: Develop an email notification system that sends real-time updates to users regarding their requests and interactions. Ensure notifications are clear, informative, and maintain user confidentiality.

epics.title: Real-time Status Updates
epics.summary: Provide real-time status updates on user requests.
epics.description: Implement a feature that provides real-time status updates on user-submitted requests within the portal. Ensure users can track the progress of their requests easily and receive immediate feedback.

epics.title: Documentation Upload
epics.summary: Allow users to upload necessary documentation.
epics.description: Create a functional component that enables users to upload required documents directly through the portal interface. Ensure that document uploads are secure and accessible for processing.

epics.title: Interaction History
epics.summary: Maintain a comprehensive history of user interactions.
epics.description: Develop a system to maintain an interaction history of all user activities within the portal. Ensure the history is easily accessible and presented in a clear and organized manner.

epics.title: Role-based Access Control
epics.summary: Implement role-based access control for secure data access.
epics.description: Design and implement role-based access control to ensure users can only view and access services appropriate to their profile and authorization level. Ensure that the control system is secure and flexible to accommodate different user roles.

epics.title: Multi-device Responsiveness
epics.summary: Ensure the portal is responsive across various devices.
epics.description: Develop the portal interface to be fully responsive, providing a consistent user experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. Test the responsiveness thoroughly and optimize the design for each device type.

epics.title: Advanced Security Protocols
epics.summary: Implement advanced security measures for data protection.
epics.description: Implement advanced security protocols to ensure the protection of sensitive financial data. This includes encryption, secure coding practices, regular security audits, and compliance with relevant regulations.

epics.title: Performance Optimization
epics.summary: Optimize the performance of the self-service portal.
epics.description: Ensure the portal performs efficiently under high traffic conditions. Implement performance monitoring and optimization techniques, including load balancing, caching, and database indexing.
